message:
perf(fnp-ufunc): optimize elementwise binary ops for same-shape arrays

- Add `is_all_ignore()` helper to FloatErrorState for checking if error
  checks can be skipped
- Implement specialized fast paths for Add/Sub/Mul/Div when all float
  error modes are Ignore - uses tight loops that LLVM can auto-vectorize
- Refactor error-checking path to use zip iteration with pre-allocated
  output for better cache locality
- Fix clippy warning: use array literal instead of vec! in test

Closes: franken_numpy-w4zs.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
